Notes: North Greenville won first meeting of season 58-56 on Jan. 19.
King won a 65-55 contest last season in Bristol
Game.Officials: Sheryl Ball,  Suzanne Byrd & Kim Crabtree

Usage Percentage: The percentage of team plays used by a player.
